summary: Comprehensive testing of Spellcasting Popup features including Paradox system, Mana mitigation, Yantras, and Dice Roller integration. All core features are working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Spellcasting Popup features tested and working: Practice dropdown, Spell Factors (Standard/Advanced), Yantras selection with max limit, Paradox system with Reach calculation, Mana mitigation, Chance Die mechanic, Cast Spell button triggering Dice Roller, Roll Paradox button. Sin-Eater characters correctly hide Mage-specific features.

spellcasting_popup.practice_dropdown: PASS - Pre-selects clicked practice, dropdown works
spellcasting_popup.spell_factors: PASS - Standard/Advanced toggles work, +1R indicators show correctly
spellcasting_popup.potency_duration_scale_controls: PASS - Level controls work with dice penalties
spellcasting_popup.yantras_section: PASS - Shows correct max (2 for Gnosis 1), selection adds bonus dice
spellcasting_popup.dedicated_tool_yantra: PASS - Shows -2P indicator, reduces Paradox pool
spellcasting_popup.rote_skill_mudra: NOT TESTED - Would need to verify bonus input
spellcasting_popup.paradox_section: PASS - Appears when Reach exceeds Free Reach
spellcasting_popup.paradox_modifiers: PASS - Inured (+2), Sleeper Witnesses (+1) checkboxes visible
spellcasting_popup.sleeper_witness_scale: NOT TESTED - Would need to check dropdown
spellcasting_popup.mana_mitigation: PASS - Spending Mana removes Paradox dice
spellcasting_popup.chance_die_mechanic: PASS - Shows CHANCE DIE in amber when Paradox reduced to 0
spellcasting_popup.summary_section: PASS - Shows Final Dice Pool, Reach, Mana costs, Paradox info
spellcasting_popup.cast_spell_button: PASS - Triggers Dice Roller with correct pool and label
spellcasting_popup.dice_roller_auto_roll: PASS - Auto-rolls when triggered from Cast Spell
spellcasting_popup.roll_paradox_button: PASS - Appears after spell roll when Paradox exists

character_type_separation.mage_features: PASS - Mage characters show ARCANA, SPELLS & ATTAINMENTS section
character_type_separation.sineater_features: PASS - Sin-Eater characters show HAUNTS, KEYS & MEMENTOS instead
